summary: Completed testing of 11 Nivant Lodge app changes. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 11 features verified via Playwright. Fresh service modal, check-in validation, additional guests, signature pad, same-as-mobile checkbox, send bill WhatsApp, room types, and Form C date filter all working correctly.

minor.issue: The hotel_rules in settings already contain early arrival warning text ('Do NOT arrive before 12:00 PM', 'Early arrivals will be charged Rs.500'). This causes walk-in guests to see early arrival warning even though the code correctly adds ADDITIONAL warning only for channel bookings. The base rules should be updated to remove early arrival text since it's supposed to be conditionally added.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/bookings/fresh - Creates fresh service with num_people and payment_method (NO guest_name/guest_phone required)
Backend: POST /api/bookings/fresh - Returns FR- prefix booking_id, booking_type='fresh', total_amount=200
Backend: POST /api/bookings/checkin - Empty name returns 400 with 'name required' message
Backend: POST /api/bookings/checkin - Short name (<2 chars) returns 400
Backend: POST /api/bookings/checkin - Phone not 10 digits returns 400 with '10 digits' message
Backend: POST /api/bookings/checkin - Aadhar not 12 digits returns 400 with '12 digits' message
Backend: POST /api/bookings/checkin - additional_guests array stored in guest doc
Backend: POST /api/bookings/checkin - aadhar_photo and signature base64 stored in guest doc
Backend: POST /api/bookings/checkin - Walk-in (source_channel='walk-in') does NOT get ADDITIONAL early arrival warning
Backend: POST /api/bookings/checkin - Channel booking (source_channel='CH-OYO') gets early arrival warning
Backend: POST /api/bookings/{id}/send-bill - Sends bill via WhatsApp (MOCKED), returns phone and content
Backend: GET /api/rooms - Room types are 'standard', 'deluxe', 'ac_deluxe' (no 'non_ac_deluxe')
Backend: GET /api/formc/export - Accepts from_date and to_date query params for filtering
Backend: GET /api/formc/export - Returns records, csv_data, total_guests
Backend: Valid check-in with all fields succeeds
Frontend: Dashboard shows Fresh Service buttons with room numbers
Frontend: Fresh modal shows 'Number of People' selector (1-5) + Cash/UPI buttons (NO guest_name/phone fields)
Frontend: Check-in page has 'Same as Mobile' checkbox for WhatsApp number
Frontend: Check-in page has signature pad with Clear and Save Signature buttons
Frontend: Check-in page has 'Add Guest' button for additional guests
Frontend: Check-in page shows red validation errors for empty/invalid fields
Frontend: Room Detail page has 'Bill WhatsApp' button (बिल WhatsApp)
Frontend: Room Management page shows Standard/Deluxe/AC Deluxe room types
Frontend: Form C page has date range filter with From/To date inputs and Filter button
action_items: OPTIONAL: Update hotel_rules in settings to remove early arrival warning text since it's conditionally added by code for channel bookings only

mocked_apis.WhatsApp Business API: Messages logged to DB with 'mocked_sent' status - send-bill, welcome, wifi, rules messages all mocked

seed_data_creation: Test bookings created with TEST_ prefix during backend tests, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 features tested and working: 1) Fresh service accepts num_people + payment_method only (no guest name/phone), 2) Additional guests stored in guest doc, 3) Aadhar photo + signature stored as base64, 4) Early arrival warning conditional on source_channel (code works but hotel_rules in settings has redundant text), 5) Check-in validation for name/phone/aadhar, 6) Send bill WhatsApp endpoint works, 7) Room types are standard/deluxe/ac_deluxe, 8) Form C date filter works, 9) Same as Mobile checkbox on check-in, 10) Signature pad on check-in, 11) Fresh modal has people selector + payment buttons.

features_verified.additional_guests: ✓ additional_guests array stored in guest doc
features_verified.aadhar_photo_signature: ✓ aadhar_photo and signature base64 stored in guest doc
features_verified.early_arrival_conditional: ✓ Code adds warning only for non-walk-in bookings (hotel_rules has redundant text)
features_verified.checkin_validation: ✓ name (min 2 chars), phone (10 digits), aadhar (12 digits) validated
features_verified.formc_date_filter: ✓ from_date and to_date query params work
features_verified.same_as_mobile_checkbox: ✓ Frontend checkbox copies phone to WhatsApp field
features_verified.signature_pad: ✓ Canvas signature pad with Clear/Save buttons
features_verified.fresh_modal_ui: ✓ Number selector (1-5) + Cash/UPI buttons, no guest name/phone fields
